input.raw_idea: Landing-page draft for an AI workflow assistant for small revenue teams. It promises to summarize account notes, draft follow-up tasks, flag stale opportunities, sync updates into the CRM, and reduce weekly admin work. The page mentions SOC 2 readiness, team approvals, and a partner directory, but there are no sellers, buyers, listings, transactions, or enterprise procurement motion.
input.goal: Evaluate buyer workflow, retention, reliability, differentiation, and willingness to pay for a realistic AI SaaS pitch.
input.context: Marketing copy is polished but evidence is thin; security and directory wording should not pull this into enterprise or marketplace reasoning.

not_contains.name: no marketplace enterprise creator medical drift

labels.name: unsupported claims cannot be high confidence
